channel.title: Math on Mighten's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Math on Mighten's Blog

item.title: Discrete Math Ch02 Logic of Compound Statements
item.description:
This is the reading note for Chapter 02 of the book *Discrete Mathematic with Applications*.
Chapter 02 "The Logic of Compound Statements" introduces the basics of **propositional logic**. It explores how *statements* are combined using *logical connectives*, explains different forms of *conditional statements*, and discusses *valid arguments* and *common fallacies*.

item.title: Discrete Math Ch01 Speaking Mathematically
item.description:
This is the reading note for Chapter 01 of the book *Discrete Mathematic with Applications*.
Chapter 01 "Speaking Mathematically" introduces foundation for mathematical thought, the language of *variables*, *sets*, *relations*, and *functions*.
